description: The port is conducting maintenance dredging of a channel. An environmental officer must monitor for compliance.

nodes.task_description: Review the environmental permit for the dredging project, noting any specific conditions.

expected_outcome.value: Officer reviews the permit, which requires monitoring of water turbidity.

nodes.task_description: Check the real-time water quality sensor data near the dredging operation.

expected_outcome.value: The officer checks the turbidity sensor readings on their dashboard.

nodes.task_description: If turbidity exceeds permitted levels, instruct the dredging contractor to pause operations until it subsides.

expected_outcome.value: The officer sees a spike in turbidity, contacts the contractor, and instructs them to stop work temporarily, logging the action.
